headline: Prologis Expands European Logistics Platform With La Caisse And Global Partners
summary: Prologis (NYSE:PLD) has launched a multi billion dollar pan European logistics joint venture with La Caisse (PLIVE). The new venture expands Prologis' European footprint and adds to its strategic capital platform. Prologis is also forming new partnerships with global investors, including GIC, to support platform growth. Prologis focuses on logistics real estate and related platforms, so a pan European venture with La Caisse directly targets a core part of its business. For readers tracking...
